summary: Comprehensive testing of Ark IDE P0 bug fixes completed. Both critical issues (infinite thinking loop and missing App Preview) are FIXED and working correctly.

minor.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error - FIXED by excluding _id from response
Tool fails when LLM sends empty args {} instead of {path: '.'} - fallback behavior handles this gracefully

critical_code_review_comments: P0 Bug #1 (Infinite Loop) - VERIFIED FIXED: Agent completes within max_steps=10 and outputs 'done' state properly
P0 Bug #2 (Missing Preview) - VERIFIED FIXED: 3-panel layout with Preview/Files tabs and iframe working correctly
Mobile layout - Quick Actions NOT blocked by overlay (hidden lg:flex class working)
Session creation and execution flow working end-to-end
File creation via agent verified - test_ui.txt created with correct content
test_credentials: No auth required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test sessions and todos created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs are fixed. Agent execution completes in 2-4 steps typically. Preview panel with tabs working. Todo endpoint had ObjectId serialization issue that was fixed. All 19 backend API tests pass.

evidence: Agent completed file creation task in 4 steps (within max_steps=10)
Session status changed to 'completed' with 'done' step type
File test_ui.txt was actually created with correct content
3-panel desktop layout visible with Execution Feed, Preview Panel, Quick Actions
Preview tab and Files tab both present and switchable
URL bar and refresh button functional
Mobile layout shows Quick Actions without overlay blocking
